description_long: This is a medium-sized hardcover book with a predominantly light blue cover and a vertical, slightly lighter blue stripe running down the left side of the front. The front cover features large, centered text in a modern sans-serif font. The book's spine and back cover are also light blue, with the spine showing no visible text or decoration. The pages are visible from the top and side views, appearing as a block of off-white paper. The book has a clean, minimalist design with no visible illustrations or graphics on the cover. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary, possibly self-published or custom-made book.
description: A light blue hardcover book with a minimalist design, featuring a vertical stripe and bold front cover text. The book has no visible illustrations or graphics.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing a light blue background, a vertical lighter blue stripe on the left, and large centered text.
description_view_1: The spine and top edges of the pages are visible, with the spine being plain light blue and no text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, showing a plain light blue surface with a vertical lighter blue stripe, and no text or graphics.
description_view_3: The opposite edge of the book is visible, showing the thickness of the pages and the plain blue back cover.
attribute_title_text: COOL BOOK ABOUT MARTIN, A REALLY COOL GUY THAT IS COOL
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain light blue with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. It has a clean, minimalist appearance.
